results.title: US judge won't block Trump's White House UFC mixed martial arts event
results.description: WASHINGTON, June 12 (Reuters) - A federal judge ⁠declined on Friday to block President Donald Trump from hosting a special Ultimate Fighting Championship mixed martial arts event ⁠on the White House grounds, letting the fights set to be held on Sunday inside a towering new structure ‌proceed.

results.title: Rigorous Training now offering fitness classes in Porter
results.description: The training center offers class-based services for all skill levels including conditioning, cross training and strength training.

results.title: Fernando Alonso FIA verdict reached as punishments issued
results.description: The Aston Martin was seen breaking the rules during FP2 in his home race.

results.title: David Hockney, revolutionary British artist famed for his pools and portraits, dies aged 88
results.description: The Bradford-born painter made his name with sunkissed visions of California and never stopped breaking barriers, going on to become one of contemporary art’s most important figures

results.title: Why Phillies are Byron Buxton's best landing spot at MLB trade deadline
